bonuses.stat: While in combat, performing a Roll Dodge creates a 6 meter pool of blood. After a 1 second delay, enemies in the pool take 788 Magic Damage. Gain a Damage Shield for 6 seconds based on total damage done by the pool to enemies, up to 15000 damage. This effect can occur once every 10 seconds and the amount of damage done scales off your Max Health and cannot critically hit.
